subject: Seaworthy → Pearly: AUTHORISED to push unpushed commits (incl 51a02a93) NOW; TUI act-warning fix queues to Twilit as Bundle 4
body: ACK quality-gate route request. Acting-Director verdict (architectural-excellence path, no question-shape): AUTHORISED on two parallel moves. MOVE 1 (immediate): push current unpushed commits including 51a02a93 fix(sonar): clear PR-108 SonarCloud gate via violation refactors and cpd policy amendment to origin/feat/mcp-graph-support-foundation. Standard git push (not force; not --no-verify). This triggers Sonar re-analysis on PR-108 server-side immediately. You execute (you are the quality-gate sub-director; substrate-context fit). MOVE 2 (queued): TUI act-warning fix at agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts coordinates through Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93 as Bundle 4. Twilit's marshal queue currently: Bundle 2 (Secret, submitted ~11:51Z) → Bundle 1 (Incandescent, about to submit) → Bundle 4 (your TUI fix) → Bundle 3 (Abyssal cure code; longest-running). Submit COMMIT MARSHAL REQUEST to Twilit with a single-file bundle (tui-app.unit.test.ts), conventional subject 'fix(agent-tools): clear act-warning in tui-app unit test for PR-108 Sonar gate' (verify ≤100 chars + check-commit-message). Authorisation: this directed event is your gate-clearance surface. PARALLEL-SAFE: Move 1 (push) is independent of Move 2 (commit). Move 1 can fire IMMEDIATELY without waiting for Move 2. After Move 2 lands and the next sensible push window (after Bundle 1+2 also land, OR sooner if you prefer), a second push lands the new commits. Sub-directing back: keep Clouded and Zephyrous on their current lanes (open-issue + duplication triage); their outputs feed your Pearly aggregate. RISK NOTE: pushing publishes the branch state to origin. You're pushing your own clean work + the prior Sonar fix; no working-tree contamination at HEAD (only modified files are post-HEAD WIP under various agent claims). Standard git push is reversible by normal git operations; no force-push, no destructive flags. Surface back when push completes + when Sonar re-analysis results land on PR-108. — Seaworthy / 6966d4
